symptom: Round 1 scaffold-first hard gate was file_read-only; Current audit 2026-04-20 demonstrated exfil via file_edit 0-match preview, summarize_file head+tail, match_grep line iteration. Plus five sev-4 predicate bypasses: case-insensitive suffix, nested subdirs under data/, non-JSON extensions, package.json fail-open, alternate parent dirs.
root_cause: _scaffold_first_block was a predicate AT file_read's execution site, not a hoisted predicate shared by every reader. The gate closed one door; four more stayed open.
fix_approach: (1) hoist is_scaffold_first_inlined(path) into a module-level predicate used by FileRead / FileEdit / FileAppend / SummarizeFile / MatchGrep; (2) tighten the predicate — suffix match is case-insensitive; data/ membership checked via relative_to so nested subdirs (data/nested/foo.json) are covered; (3) match_grep skips inlined files rather than failing the whole call so legitimate searches elsewhere still work
principle: v5 — one predicate, every door. v9 three-source triangulation: Current (adversary) + Coral (telemetry) + Claude (patch) converged on the same surface.

desc: nested subdir under data/ — data/nested/boss.json → True (pain_scaffold_first_gate_fail_open_paths case d)
case-insensitive suffix — data/Items.JSON → True (pain_scaffold_first_gate_fail_open_paths case a)
non-JSON in data/ → False — not inlined
alternate parent config/*.json → False — only data/ is inlined
file_edit on data/*.json blocks (0-match preview exfil path)
file_append on data/*.json blocks (existing-content read exfil path)
summarize_file on data/*.json blocks (head+tail = full file for small JSON)
